surface.title: 3 JV agreements flagged for review
surface.message: Three joint venture agreements (acceleratedtechnologiesholdingcorp_04_24_2003.txt, sibannac_12_04_2017.txt, and veoneer_02_21_2020.txt) have critical findings related to survival-of-pre-closing-claims risk.  Consider opening these first for a portfolio position.
